expectations.text: Report names at least 3 specific files, not just layer-level guidance
expectations.evidence: Names PlaygroundService.cs, ModelClient.cs, OpenAiCallParser.cs, and many others

expectations.text: Includes a numeric overall coverage percentage
expectations.evidence: 'TOTAL 7246/11471 = 63.2%' (different number than skill's 50.6% because baseline re-ran coverage.sh)
Per-layer table covers all Trsr.* projects

expectations.text: Top recommendations cite a concrete signal (churn / complexity / untested public API / coverage %)
expectations.evidence: Uses absolute uncovered-line counts and zero-coverage flags; does NOT use churn or complexity signals

expectations.text: Closes with a clear next step (offer to draft tests for a specific file)
expectations.evidence: Closes with explicit 'spend the day in this order' numbered list with time budgets

expectations.text: Does not write any artifact files into the repo
